name: Iso11783FSGetFileInfo
title: Iso11783FSGetFileInfo
syntax: long Iso11783FSGetFileInfo( dword fileHandle, dword infoCount, dword retInfo[] );
description: This function retrieves information about a file or directory. In the entry of the array, the following information is returned:
bit-field with valid entries, bit 1 set = index 1 is valid, ...

parameters.name: fileHandle
parameters.description: File or directory handle, see also Iso11783FSOpenFile
